use_cases: Previewing external URLs before navigating to enhance user confidence
Displaying link metadata and screenshots in documentation sites
Creating interactive product or service link cards in e-commerce
Building rich article or blog post link previews with thumbnails
Adding link previews to social platforms or messaging interfaces
ai_summary: A hover-triggered link preview component built with Radix UI primitives and Framer Motion that displays URL screenshots and metadata in an animated floating card. Features spring-based mouse tracking for subtle parallax effects and supports both dynamic URL fetching via microlink API and static image sources.
